summary: Strategic technical leader with 16 years of expertise architecting resilient distributed systems, AI-native engineering practices, and product-aligned delivery platforms. I bridge executive vision and engineering reality by turning ambiguity into decision records, trade-off models, and systems that teams can evolve safely. Proven track record in mentoring senior engineers, improving SDLC flow with AI-assisted methods, and delivering scalable BFF and service architectures for high-stakes financial, travel, and digital-product domains.

experience.title: SOFTWARE SPECIALIST (TECHNICAL LEAD)
experience.description: Architecting and leading the development of high-concurrency BFF (Backend-for-Frontend) services within the Share Trading and Trade Banking domains. Driving technical strategy and future roadmap planning for business-critical banking infrastructure. Championing the adoption of AI-assisted engineering practices across teams to increase velocity and maintain robust code hygiene. Serving as a primary technical liaison between C-suite stakeholders and cross-functional engineering squads, ensuring architectural alignment with long-term business objectives.

experience.title: SENIOR SOFTWARE ENGINEER
experience.description: Engineered scalable React and .NET solutions for global flight booking engines, focusing on high-performance search aggregation. Mentored senior-level peers in modernizing legacy architectures and implementing efficient React patterns. Successfully led rapid prototyping initiatives, winning the Serko Hackathon 2023 for a solution that significantly reduced search latency. Collaborated with UX and Product leads to redefine the enterprise booking journey, resulting in measurable increases in customer conversion rates.

experience.title: SOFTWARE SPECIALIST / SENIOR DEVELOPER
experience.description: Developed modern web application forms and BFF services for FNB and Home Lending products. Contributed to major digital transformation initiatives across customer onboarding and lending workflows. Supported architectural discussions and implementation planning.

experience.title: SENIOR DEVELOPER (SUBCONTRACTOR TO ASB)
experience.description: Sub-contracted directly to ASB Bank, initiating work on the digital transformation of FNB and Home Lending products. Built foundational C# .NET backend services to automate complex lending workflows.

experience.title: CREATIVE TECHNOLOGIST (FULL-STACK)
experience.description: Architected multi-modal digital experiences across Computer Vision, AR/VR (XR), and high-scale mobile platforms. Spearheaded the development of complex chatbot ecosystems and low-level driver integrations for enterprise clients. Operated as a key technical pivot between creative design teams and engineering squads, translating high-level concepts into stable, production-ready code in a high-velocity agency environment.

experience.title: TECHNICAL ADVISORY & FOUNDATIONAL ENGINEERING
experience.description: Diverse background encompassing technical advisory for startups, subcontracted engineering for government and enterprise clients, and foundational game development. Specialized in rapid technical assessment, architectural cleanup, and cross-platform deployment. Leveraged deep expertise in Unity/C# and full-stack web technologies to support innovation-driven projects across markets.

projects.title: Market Systems Architecture Lab
projects.description: An interactive one-page architecture case study for a hypothetical market-intelligence platform. The scenario explores how to ingest fast-moving signals, preserve auditability, isolate risk, and keep research teams productive without turning every experiment into production infrastructure.
projects.summary: Hypothetical quant-style architecture demo for market signals, risk controls, and evolvable delivery.

projects.title: Idle Jobber
projects.description: Job-search automation tool. Takes your CV as a PDF, then scans job boards for suitable roles, and drafts tailored cover letters for you to review and send. Long-term vision is to fully automate job-application for jobs that meet criteria.
projects.summary: Job-search automation tool. Take away all the stress of job-seeking!

projects.title: WordPress AI Chatbot Plugin
projects.description: Open-source chatbot plugin integrating various LLM providers. Tons of customization options, theme-agnostic design.
projects.summary: WordPress plugin integrating LLM providers as a chatbot for answering simple queries. This has since been made open source on Github.

projects.title: Flight Express Search
projects.summary: High-performance search flow for flight bookings.
projects.description: High-performance multi-provider flight search engine for Serko. Sub-300ms aggregated search across 12+ airline GDS feeds with intelligent caching.

projects.description: HoloLens 2 mixed reality navigation app for virtual apartment tours. Spatial anchoring, gesture control, and real-time floor plan rendering.
